About: It is about the belief that white people are superior to those of other races.
It is about the maintenance and defense of any power and privilege held by white people.
It is about a social system in which white people enjoy structural advantages over other ethnic groups.
Affects: It affects the maintenance and defense of any power and privilege held by white people.
It affects the domination by white people and non-white supporters.
It affects the social system in which white people enjoy structural advantages over other ethnic groups.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the now-discredited doctrine of scientific racism.
It is associated with European colonialism.
It is associated with the Atlantic slave trade.
It is associated with European colonial labor and social practices.
It is associated with the Scramble for Africa.
It is associated with Jim Crow laws in the United States.
It is associated with the activities of the Native Land Court in New Zealand.
It is associated with the White Australia policies from the 1890s to the mid-1970s.
It is associated with apartheid in South Africa.
It is associated with neo-Confederates.
BelongsTo: It belongs to a spectrum of contemporary movements including white nationalism, white separatism, neo-Nazism, and the Christian Identity movement.
CausedBy: It is caused by the belief that white people are superior to those of other races.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a belief in racial purity.
It consists of the idea of white superiority and black inferiority.
CreatedTo: It was created to justify economic exploitation of black people.
HasA: It has ideological foundations that date back to 18th-century scientific racism.
